title: anthoxanthum odoratum var. puelii
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum var. puelii, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. Traditionally, sweet vernal grass has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and hay fever. In herbal preparations, sweet vernal grass is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or compress to treat various health conditions.
